metadata.scope: offline ranking over structured profiles and a curated full catalog; does not evaluate extraction, production retrieval, ingestion, or explanations

llm_layer_status.provider_error: Arrearage (Alibaba Model Studio account overdue payment); all LLM calls returned HTTP 400
llm_layer_status.consequence: Every Qwen listwise-rerank vote and every DeepSeek judge call failed, so the reranker degraded to deterministic order on all personas/runs. The 'deterministic+llm_rerank' variant is therefore byte-identical to the deterministic baseline, and the significance block (p=1.0, 30 ties, zero delta) is a fallback artifact, NOT evidence about the reranker. No judge/agreement statistics were produced.
llm_layer_status.valid_from_this_run: Only the deterministic baseline vs the frozen holdout labels: mean_ndcg@3=0.852, hit@1=0.80, avoid/budget violation=0.0, diversity=0.754.
llm_layer_status.to_obtain_valid_holdout_ab: Settle the DashScope account, then rerun the exact finalize-gated command in agent/README.md (personas-holdout.json is already frozen; SHA in this file).
